final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID badge for ByteDance, showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, corporate ID card mockup, clean studio lighting
Composition: flat-lay top-down view, two cards placed side by side (front and back), macro lens detail
Subject: standard employee ID badge with portrait photo, company name, employee name, ID number, and access chip
Scene/backdrop: neutral white or light gray surface, minimal corporate aesthetic
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio light from above, even illumination, professional and clean
Color palette: ByteDance brand blue as accent, white card base, black text, subtle gray details
Materials/textures: matte plastic card surface, slight rounded corners, subtle embossed text, glossy photo area
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动"
Constraints: both front and back must be visible; front shows portrait and employee info; back shows magnetic stripe or chip area
Avoid: blurry text, distorted proportions, overly reflective surface, watermark, generic stock photo look
